summary: Website for Gowtham Groups inspired by danielmerchandising.co.in
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Corporate hero background image with modern business aesthetic (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Professional company logo for Gowtham Groups with transparent background (gowtham-logo.dim_400x200.png)
- Service icon for manufacturing or production operations (service-manufacturing.dim_256x256.png)
- Service icon for logistics or distribution (service-logistics.dim_256x256.png)
- Service icon for retail or merchandising (service-retail.dim_256x256.png)
- About section background with subtle corporate pattern (about-bg.dim_1200x800.png)

existing_features.title: Create a hero section with company branding, tagline, and prominent call-to-action button that welcomes visitors to Gowtham Groups
Implement an About Us section describing Gowtham Groups' company overview, mission, vision, and core values
Create a Services/Products section showcasing Gowtham Groups' business offerings with cards or tiles for each service category
Build a Contact section with company contact information including address, phone, email, and a contact form for inquiries
Create a responsive navigation header with logo and menu items linking to different sections (Home, About, Services, Contact)
Implement a footer section with company information, quick links, social media icons, and copyright notice
Design the website with a professional, corporate visual theme using a sophisticated color palette with elegant typography and modern layout patterns suitable for a business group
